solution_candidates.title: Real-Time Contamination Early Warning + Proof Packet
solution_candidates.type: real-time detection + evidence artifact + operator playbook
solution_candidates.why_now: Interview synthesis indicates hidden costs, operator-sensed onset before instruments, and the need for proof to resolve contradictions.
requirements: Deploy sensor fusion at/near critical entry/transfer point (start minimal, expand as validated).
Event capture with confidence gating (avoid alarm fatigue).
Proof packet per event: timestamps, top features, short raw snippet pointer (optional), operator notes, recommended response.
Operator-first response playbook integrated into workflow.

mvp_spec.objective: Detect abnormal contamination onset earlier than current signals, with evidence and low false positives.

deployment_zone.primary: blow line entry / transfer point (closest recurring blind spot)

detection_logic.windowing: sliding window 1–5s; evaluate per window + burst aggregation

gating.baseline_update: only update baseline in stable steady-state

nonnegotiables: must log evidence for every alarm
must degrade safely (fail to 'monitoring only' not spam)

success_metrics: lead time gained vs current detection (seconds/minutes)
false positives per shift below threshold
reduction in severity/cascade damage when triggers occur

acceptance_thresholds.detection_latency_gain: >= 30 seconds earlier (or operator-confirmed usable lead time)

ops_playbook: On RED: slow feed / divert if possible; inspect transfer point; verify contamination; log outcome.
On repeated YELLOW: schedule micro-inspection; check magnets/screens; log conditions (weather, yard, supplier).
Always: record whether contamination was confirmed and what action prevented damage.
risk_controls: maintenance: weekly health check; monthly baseline verification

solution_candidates.title: True Cost Discovery + ROI Engine
solution_candidates.why_now: Synthesis indicates true cost impact is often understated; ROI must be evidence-backed to unlock pilots.
requirements: Incident cost worksheet (10 minutes to fill)
Standard categories: downtime, labor, cleanup, quality, repairs
Tie costs to events and equipment hotspots

mvp_spec.objective: Turn hidden costs into repeatable evidence per event and per year.
nonnegotiables: does not require finance involvement to start

risk_controls: keep repair costs and total costs separately reported
require uncertainty ranges when estimates are guessed
log source interview numbers for major assumptions

solution_candidates.title: Interview Targeting Engine (Gap Closure)
solution_candidates.why_now: Information gaps identify missing cube positions. Targeted interviews increase info gain and accelerate convergence.
requirements: Generate question sets tied to uncertain hypotheses

mvp_spec.objective: Ask the next best interviews to reduce uncertainty fastest.

risk_controls: tag each question to a hypothesis id

gap_plan.rationale: This fills a high-priority gap (cube_position) with 80% expected information gain
This fills a high-priority gap (cube_position) with 80% expected information gain

notes: Deterministic solution synthesis grounded in interviews/graph/synthesis; grows with every interview update.
